description: Unit: action input schema extraction preserves the multiline presentation hint on string fields.
Unit: action input schema extraction leaves fields without the multiline hint unchanged.
Component: fixed-value editor renders a TextArea for a string field marked with the multiline hint.
Component: fixed-value editor continues rendering a single-line Input for ordinary string fields without the hint.
Component: nullable multiline string fields still support null/value switching without losing the textarea editor.
Registry/unit: ai.infer prompt schema is annotated with the multiline presentation hint.
Integration/UI: workflow designer shows the ai.infer prompt fixed-value control as a multiline textarea.
Regression: workflow designer startup and bundle compilation remain clean after introducing the authoring-side multiline hint.
